reviews.review_description: It is buggy, won’t let me get past the story, and the powers are wonky, it’s also inconsistent with its updates. It has only had 2 updates in the past year it was out. Waste of my money.

I’ve had this game for about a year and I love it the concept is amazing the graphics are great and the gameplay is so fun. 

Pros:

Multiplayer 
Fun
Story

Cons:

Recommendations:
More elements like lighting,light,gravity, and ice
More stuff to do in multiplayer 

Love your game please consider the idea and make this game greater.

Just got bored and I think elements divided is better but that’s my opinion this is still very good

I love this. I really get the experience of Avatar and sandbox is so much fun with the error people that you get to fight in the Earth and the fire water. I'm sure we're gonna see some later. Because they just had the update with the people in sandbox. So they might add them later on. And then it's really fun with multiplayer. That way I can find my friends and we can also fight people there. That we spawn in. And if people say that you don't have enough health or enough stamina, you can just go to sandbox. Go to settings on the little menu thing on the table and click infinite health and infinite manner. And if it's too buggy, maybe it's a software update, but in my opinion, I love this? reviews.review_title: My kid loves this game, but…
reviews.review_description: My kid really enjoys all aspects of this game, but had one change they wanted to suggest. They accidentally clicked the ‘clear’ button on their saved file and lost all their game play instantly. They would really have liked there to be an ‘are you sure’ step. They are afraid they could accidentally click there again.

reviews.review_title: Almost the best avatar game ever
reviews.review_description: I LOVE this game but one problem persists and that is it’s not ready yet water and air still don’t have temples and some spell shards can’t be collected a lot of the game can be cheezed by flying and sometimes you die randomly but I still love this game and am waiting for new updates… its mid 2025 and I need an air temple most other vr games kinda suck
I love this game. Casting the spells is fun. Fighting enemies is fun. Exploring the map is fun. Exploring the dungeons is fun. Everything is fun in this game.
I have been playing this game for almost 2 years now, and its SO MUCH FUN. Im a master/beta tester for the game and i have met some great people through this community.

reviews.review_title: DO NOT BELIVE THE NEGATIVE REVIEWS
reviews.review_description: i keep seeing reviews saying “nothing works properly” it is NOT THE GAMES FAULT THEY JUST ARENT GOOD AT IT or they say the visuals are “horrible” when it’s meant to look simplistic, yes the abilities are hard but they do work if you put in time

reviews.review_title: The game that just keeps getting better
reviews.review_description:
This game is fun,challenging, and has a very nice community. I got this game beacuse it look like one of my favorite games wizard of legend, but more people compare it with avatar. If you’re looking at getting this game it is a definite choice to get it.  Here’s pros and cons  

PROS: 

1:The spells are amazing to use and requires great skill but just practicing one at a time will help improve and the motion tracking is wonderful full making it very immersive.  

2: it’s story mode is just wonderful with the dungeons and islands to explore while also having challenges you can do for more fun not to mention that its story is just amazing I just love reading each journal not and just wondering what could this lead to. 

3: I have not ever met a toxic person on a server and when people lose they always congratulate you or saying that was really fun and I met people that showed me a lot about magitek and how to use some real handy combos and each person is just so kind I really enjoy the community and it’s just makes this game’s multiplayer experience way better.

4: Magitek has amazing vr physics that most games don’t have. I enjoy going into magitek and playing around with the weapons and ice cube which was surprisingly really fun than I thought and climbing with icicles is also wonderful to do 

5: I also want to point out that the dev team is amazing and always listen to people and pointing out glitches and stunts they do. And are amazing with there game events like multiplayer tournaments and Easter egg hunts. Better yet they don’t charge players to get cosmetics but to get them you simply just have to have fun. 

CONS: 

1: there’s not much spells with the range of 6 or more spells for each element but I bet that as the game goes on more spells will be added 

2: that multiplayer doesn’t have all the spells but only 2 which are frost spray and air deflect  and I don’t know why but I’m sure there’s a reason 

3: That the game has some bugs and glitches but also it is a three man dev team which always work there hardest and I think they do great at fixing bugs. 


So really there not much cons in this but that’s just beacuse I simply just enjoy the game and play it about every day I got the game once I got my own quest 3S and it’s just a game I’ve been playing sense and really improved when it fully launched off early access and put on store it’s a great game and I bet you that you will have a great experience once you get on. 

-blast Wyvern
The only thing I can really say it’s a good game, but it’s easy to get lost cause I played one time and never played it again because I got lost ￼￼

I don't know where to start. After trying similar games and even new developed ones before trying this one I am completely disappointed. The visuals are poor, the abilities for each element are not impressive at all and very hard to understand and execute.
I tried sandbox and it was a joke nothing was working properly and i had to give up. But even if it would i simply don't like this game at all. The whole experience is very poor and boring and the skills are lacking imagination.
Perhaps after trying similar games and being so impressed this one feels totally unnecessary to play.
I love ATLA and enjoyed watching tlok and seeing these elements in here brightens my day… and I can not WAIT for sub bending… blood bending lava bending etc PLEASE
The game is not worth $16 and the quality is horrible and the game kept kicking me from it and kept restarting me it is not worth what you paid ￼￼

If you want to be able to bend every element on standalone, this is the game to get. The bending is simplistic and easy to learn, yet it gives you so much freedom in what moves you wanna do. Each element has a different play style and map best for it. All the elements are balanced in some way. The one thing this game is missing is more bending abilities, and they're being worked on! The creators are constantly working on this game and are updating it constantly. Sub bending will hopefully be added, and it's never been seen in a vr game with multiplayer before! This game has a good community that is willing to teach players special moves and other things they may not know. This game is amazing I'd recommend it to anyone that's into bending games.

 Edit: In pvp there are two elements that need to be buffed and one that needs to be nerfed. Earth needs to be nerfed drastically because the movement you can do makes little to no sense to me at all. You can keep spamming earth spikes while it barely takes any mana away. Earth wall can't be destroyed by air or water by any move that they use, the only element that can counter the wall is fire. Earth needs a nerf, badly. Water needs a buff, it barely does damage and it barely does knockback, if it does any at all. Air needs a little damage buff not a lot, just a little. Air also needs to be able to blow away attacks from other elements so it can maintain its title as a more defensive element.
the graphics are pretty bad the gameplay is pretty bland and i tried refunding it and it wont let me even tho ive only played the game for like 30 minutes which im mad about. i wouldn’t recommend

Whenever I make a private server people can just join because it’s not really private. You can just guess the code. I’d make it so where you have to invite someone manually. Pls add this AND HOW LONG DO UPDATES TAKE
This is one of the best vr games I’ve ever played and it’s only made by 3 people! I play it almost daily and because of the refund there’s no reason not to get it

Ok, let me be honest. This game does have some flaws and glitches but over all 5 star game. The glitches that I have found are all funny and not game breaking. Mostly just texture details and a couple wacky but fun mishaps. The spell casting feels fresh every time you use a spell. And personally I love challenging game and this game is challenging all right. I have been playing the arena mode and trying to get to round ten to beat arena. Story is amazing for you having to learn spells from spell crystals is one of my favorite features in this game. And for some reason grabbing things in this game is just so satisfying. I found myself grabbing a wall for over five minutes just having a good time. This game has really good cartoony graphics and texture designs. Over all even with all the flaws this game is a must have for Vr. And it is even more amazing for a avatar lover like myself. But devs keep up the hard work and get those updates out because everyone will sure love them. ALSO JOIN THE DISCORD!!!!!!

The Graphics are good the game is constantly updating and improving on top of that there are multiple gamemodes including mutiplayer and a story mode for offline play 

The community is great and very welcoming can be toxic at times but thats every game 

Overall do not regret buying and have been playing it for a year and a bit now

So after playing for around 15 or so minutes after re-buying the game for the stated Update/ patch, I'm happy to see that the once immortal enemies are now disappearing after their death animation now. 😅 I actually started enjoying the experience, which I'm glad to be able to say.
I still stick by the fire throwing needing a light assist though, as aiming, avoiding damage, and praying you did the throwing gesture JUST thecway the game wants you to (I had countless moments of fire not not coming out of my throws no matter if I was charged up or not, which became exhausting at best to makingme take damage at worst). I also wish there was a sticky/ toggle grip for items like shields, as carrying one around everywhere gets a bit annoying. But that's not much of an issue.
Overall the game does seem good though, from basic mechanics to the world and its look/ graphic style. Ill have to see what it offers and how it holds up going forward (though knowing it's only 2 of 4 chapters still, so that's a HUGE detractor...), at present from whst very little I have experienced of it I can say I recommend this title!
Awesome game! They're working on combo elements and multiplayer right now it's going to be great!

Game is cheeks. The spell casting should be the best part of this game. It is literally the only thing that really needs to be good. And it isn't. Casting spells is incredibly inaccurate. For example, in order to do a fire punch, you just need to make a fist and punch forward. Easy enough. Why does the fire blast go upwards at a 45 degree angle when punching straight? In order to punch a fire blast straight, you need to punch st rhe ground It's incredibly unintuitive and immersion breaking. Another issue is, due to how spells are done (which is motion based), incorrect spells come out when trying to do other spells. People saying this game makes you feel like the Avatar. Yeah, if the Avatar was incredibly unreliable and inept.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for the feedback — we totally get where you're coming from.

The motion-based casting system definitely has a learning curve, and we know it can feel frustrating at first when things don't respond how you expect. That’s why we’re currently working on a detailed in-game tutorial that breaks down how to cast more effectively and consistently — it’s coming soon and should help make the system feel much more intuitive.

In the meantime, we highly recommend jumping into multiplayer. Our community is full of passionate players, and it’s honestly one of the best ways to pick up tips and tricks for casting. There’s a good chance someone will be more than happy to help you master the fire punch and more.

Thanks again for taking the time to share your experience — we’re always listening and working to improve.

— The Magitek Team

reviews.review_description: It's a wonderful game, in my opinion, due to Avatar being my favorite show ever. But the only note I have is that I've noticed and odd bug in which the mobs don't disappear after I defeat them. Instead, they are immortal mobs that'll keep attacking me regardless of the number of attacks I throw at them.

This game has some of the best magic abilities I have ever seen in a game, I love the natural progression of this game, the spells are simple, and most of them are very easy to learn, I think the elements are pretty balanced as well, there’s no single element in the story mode I prefer. I do wish there was more multiplayer modes, but I know the dev team is working on that. I have also found very little bugs, and the ones I have were very minor, like a useless box flying out of the world.

reviews.review_title: Best bending VR game for standalone
reviews.review_description: Magitek is a game I feel has so much potential, and that potential is not wasted. To me this game feels like a hidden gem, and it’s a shame that it hasn’t been viewed by more players. The bending is fluent but the community is better, I have yet to meet a single toxic player both in game or in the Discord. While there are some issues (campaign crashing etc) I’m certain these will be ironed out with time.

This game is so perfectly made and it’s only beginning this will have so much potential and I can’t wait for the seasons to come.
It’s is fairly simple to learn all the mechanics all it takes is practice and being a lil smart. Thank you devs for this amazing game.

reviews.review_title: PLEASE READ. LOVE the potential BUT….
reviews.review_description:
I love this game. There is so much potential. BUT… there are many major issues that can be very frustrating. However the game is still in development and I respect the process so im holding out hope.

First of all, i cant seem to crouch with my controllers. This makes playing in a confined area very difficult. 

Second, most spells dont cast properly half the time.

Third, there are no checkpoints in dungeons (that im aware of) while there are insta kill traps deep in the dungeons that cause you to restart at the beginning. It can be VERY frustrating. 

Finally, the quest menu barely works while in game. It makes it very difficult to reposition, navigate the menu, pause, or quit out. 

Keep in mind that my experience was fully on a quest two and it may change for other users. 

Overall i LOVE the idea and potential of this game, but there are a just a few things i would maybe wanna change. Keep up the hard work devs!!! And thank you for everything you do!
Best game!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Won't load on Quest One, no error given.
reviews.review_description: We have tried everything we can think of to get the game to load on Meta Quest One, Have reinstalled the app multiple times, plenty of storage available, but each time it just presents a black screen before eventually going into the app store. No contact details for the game developer and no response from Meta support. Very disappointing, my son was really looking forward to playing it for his birthday.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry to hear you had this experience. Meta is reducing there support for Quest One so its becoming harder and harder to keep support.  

But a reminder you can get a full refund for the price of the game from Meta App Lab.  Feel free to contact us via our Discord channel if you need more support.

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun to mess around with! I look forward to seeing how they improve all the bending as they progress in development. Multiplayer will be so cool to mess around with!

reviews.review_title: One minute I’m having fun and the next
reviews.review_description: It’s fun until you realize you been stuck on the same level for a whole month. It’s literally impossible. There are aren’t any checkpoints so if you die, you do it all over again and half the time I don’t even know what to do because the objective isn’t showing. So you have to reexplore the whole island ever time that you load in. The story mode if busted and an insufferable experience. And you have to restart your game if you fall under the water.
Wouldn't let me refund even though I bought it on  accident

developer_response.body: Sorry you had this experience, refunds are handled by Meta. We recommend trying to contact Meta and they will be able to get you a refund.

reviews.review_description: It’s a very good game. I hope you intelligent are you seen the YouTube page? I wish there was more water/ice spells and something that would be cool for earth. You could throw the shield like how you can throw the gauntlets.

This game is such a blast playing ! The game has a lot of pros and cons. First let’s start with the pros. I love the earth bending personally I am a fully mastered earth bender and also created a new way of traveling. By using telekinesis on a rock wall gave me an idea. Maybe if I hopped onto the wall and lay it on the ground then use telekinesis to lift it up, you could fly around with it. By the way, the other elements are really, really cool. now here are the cons you should add subbing like metal bending or lava bending or maybe plant bending your choice also, why are the fire benders so hard to defeat with the AI. Next on the story mode when you end up dying you just respond all the way back up to the beginning it doesn’t save anything! It’s just very annoying to deal with.




         By the way I am subscribed to your channel.
